creator: jhyphenkeck@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 181697
patch to update sbt from 0.13.13 to 0.13.15

patch updates sbt from 0.13.13 to the actual 0.13.15 version.


this release requires a new launcher script - so a project based upgrade in 'project/build.properties' are not enough.


----
release notes: http://www.scala-sbt.org/0.13/docs/sbt-0.13-Tech-Previews.html#sbt+0.13.15
